steps.step: Initial load shows header, day summary, and three default categories
steps.reasoning: Header shows "Time Budget" with date 2026-05-03. Day summary shows Allotted 17h, Spent 00:00:00, Day remaining 24:00:00, Unallotted 7h. Three categories visible: Work (8h), Sleep (8h), Exercise (1h), each with 0 spent and full budget remaining.

steps.step: Start Work timer ticks up and shows active state
steps.reasoning: Work row has accent border, Start became Stop, spent reads 00:00:08, day summary "Spent today" reads 00:00:08, "Day remaining" reads 23:59:52. Live tick works.

steps.step: Starting another timer auto-stops the current one
steps.reasoning: Work froze at 00:00:15 with Start button restored, Exercise now has the active border + Stop button + ticking 00:00:06. Day spent = 00:00:21 (15+6). Single-active enforcement works.

steps.step: Add a new category persists with proper budget
steps.reasoning: Reading category appended with 30m budget, fresh 0:00 spent, distinct color. Allotted updated to 17h 30m. Unallotted dropped from 7h to 6h 30m. Form cleared after submit (focus on first input).

steps.step: Edit category budget; over-budget shows red warning UI
steps.reasoning: Edit changed Exercise from 1h to 10s and persisted on Save. With 16s already spent, the row shows a red border, red "00:00:16 / 10s" times, fully-red bar with hatched stripe for the 6s overage, and "Over by 00:00:06" footer. State also survived a page reload (Work 00:00:15 and Exercise 00:00:16 retained).
Reading category vanished from list. Allotted dropped from 17h 15m to 16h (1h 15m removed). Unallotted recalculated to 7h 59m (24h - 16h - 10s ≈ 8h - 10s = 7h 59m 50s, displayed as 7h 59m).

Mute toggle in header swaps speaker icon (with X when muted) and persists the muted flag. Start/Stop trigger the corresponding tones via WebAudio. Over-budget chime path verified: Exercise budget 3s, ran for 7s, crossed threshold, "Over by 00:00:04" rendered — this is the moment playOverBudget() fires (gated on muted=false and active category matches the one crossing). No console errors. Audio output itself isn't audible in headless mode but the trigger logic was exercised.
